commentary_text: Clipped through midwicket to get MI off the mark in style! This is full around middle and leg, 134kph, and it swings into the left-hander. But Rickelton is able to neatly tuck it off his pads
And now Mukesh beats the outside edge! On a good length outside off and going across him at 134kph. Rickelton flashes a loose drive away from his body but gets no contact
Full and wide now, Rickelton hits a crisp drive but straight to the cover fielder
Mukesh strays and Rickelton capitalises. Too full and too straight outside leg, and Rickelton uses his wrists to flick it away fine and in the gap
Full and wide, Rickelton again reaches out and drives it to the cover fielder
Thick outside edge races away for four!Rohit skips out to this 137kph length ball and pokes at it. It goes off the outside half but runs wide of a very fine short third fielder
Ooh, this one bounces a bit extra off a good length and hits the splice of the bat. Ball pops back towards the bowler
Ngidi errs in line. Too full and straight and Rohit whips it off his toes over fine leg
Full outside off, drops this towards point and gets a single
Full on leg and going across, Rickelton blocks
Length ball angled across him, Rickelton looks to flat-bat it down the ground but only manages to chop it back to the bowler off the bottom half of the bat
Swing and a miss!131kph length ball angled across him, and Rickelton just plays down the wrong line as he looks to go down the ground. The ball whizzes past the outside edge

Mukesh gets the in-form Rickelton!Mukesh again goes for a length ball around off that just jags away slightly. Like the last ball, Rickelton has a wild swing looking to go downtown, but the ball hits the outside half of the bat and chips up to the Capitals skipper at mid-off
Full and wide, Tilak looks for the drive but gets an inside edge and the ball trickles to the keeper

Chipped back to the bowler, Mukesh grabs it even as he slips. And he has two in the over!Mukesh tells Ngidi he can bowl a neat slower ball as well. 114kph, full around off. Tilak was early into the shot as the ball stops on him. Pings the bat and bounces back towards Mukesh, who grabs it despite a bit of a wobble.
Zips in a length ball that comes in with the angle from outside off. Rohit punches it towards long-off
SKY eases a full ball to long-off
Full on middle, blocked back to the bowler
Rohit backs away leg side, Axar follows him with a length ball. Tucked to the leg side for a single
Driven straight to the cover fielder
On a length around middle and off, clipped square on the leg side
Fires in a long hop, but it goes down leg for a wide. Rohit was swivelling and swinging, but misses out
On a length around middle and off, punched to extra cover
Beats short fine with the sweep. This was tossed full on middle and SKY was in position early for the shot. Gets it fine on the leg side but just wide of the diving fielder

That's a ripper!Great comeback from Nigam. Draws SKY forward with a full ball outside off, and gets it to spin away past the outside edge. KL was quick behind the stumps but Surya had his back foot inside the crease
Eased to long-off for a single
Length ball outside off, punched out to deep point
Rohit looks to take on this length ball outside off. But Ngidi took the pace off and it stays a bit low. Gets it off the bottom half of the bat to the midwicket fielder
Lovely slower ball again. Full on off, and dipping on Rohit to land in the blockhole. Rohit can only block this one back to the bowler

Lucky runs for Rohit, but they all count. Another slower ball, a cutter this time, dipping and very full outside off. Rohit looks to swing it down the ground but gets an inside edge through backward square leg

Oh, Rohit Sharma you beauty!All his experience and wares on full display. He skips out of his crease as Ngidi again goes for a slower ball in the blockhole. He makes it a yorker length ball for himself but because he was leg-side enough of the ball, he just opens the blade and brings the bat down to glide it through cover
Full outside off at 91kph, driven wide of long-off for a couple of runs
On a length on middle and going on with the angle, knocked down to long-on
Legbreak outside off, draws him into the drive. Rohit gets an outside edge that goes to short third on the bounce
Overpitched outside off, SKY leans into a drive through the covers but there's protection in the deep
Full on off, Rohit brings the bat down to defend
SKY tries to work this length ball leg side but just manages an inside edge onto his pads
On a length around off, steered to point. Just seven runs off the over. DC will be happy with the last couple of overs
Full outside off, slower ball again, pushed towards mid-off
Oh, SKY picks the bones out of that one with the sweep!Quintessential SKY stuff. This is an arm ball outside off, quite full, and he gets across and helps it over backward square leg
Punched down to long-on
Whipped wide of long-on for a single
Full around off, punched wide of long-off
Full outside off, driven punchily to extra cover
Pitched up on leg, worked to long-on
Short just outside off, SKY jumps, swivels a touch and bunt-pulls it to long-on
Fullish at the stumps, 90ks, Dhir gets forward and works it to long-on. Beat the diving bowler along the way
One-bounce four over... cover? Yeah. Rutherford taking a step towards cover, launched a drive with the spin. Ruins the over a touch for Kuldeep
Driven out through the covers to the fielder in the deep

Well, he won't get an easier first ball to face than that. Too full and straying down leg. SKY just has to get some bat on it to clip it in front of square leg. The fielder in the deep was too square to stop that

You make the slightest of mistakes, and Rohit Sharma will punish ya!First six of the game!. This is overpitched, floated too full around off and Rohit clears his front leg and lofts Nigam back over his head
On a length outside off, Rohit can only cut it to Ngidi at point
Works this to deep midwicket
High-dip slower ball.... kinda paradoxical but you get what I mean. Dhir gets low and punches to long-on
Back to bouncer. Can't tell if it's slow or quick. Dug in hard but it's slow off the pitch. Anyway, Santner gets upright and pulls to deep-backward square
Skids through, a bit of low bounce. SKY opens his stance and adjusts to it with a vertical-bat flick through midwicket
Santner gets underneath the low full toss and drives it up and over cover. Looked slow but it's 128ks
Bouncer just outside off, pulled to deep midwicket
Full outside off, Rickelton now drives to extra cover
Legbreak on a length around leg, Suryakumar whips it away straight of deep midwicket
Floated up on off, Rohit works it down to long-on
Full around middle and leg, flicked through midwicket
Oh, crashed away through the covers. It's on a length outside off and sits up nicely for Rohit to slap away

Is that an edge? Umpire says no, but Rohit is walking. Umpire still hasn't given it so DC review it. Rohit has a laugh with SKY.Maybe he wasn't walking? Coz this looks like he's missed it.Yes, no contact with the bat. Kuldeep bowled it down leg and Rohit looked for the sweep. He missed and the ball went off his pads and Rahul grabbed it
Sliding.... misfield on the deep-backward-square boundary finishes the innings with a four. Started the chase well, just got no hands on it. 134ks full ball was flicked  off the front foot.
Rickelton gets squared up a bit by this Ngidi slower ball. It's full around leg and as Rickelton looks to work it leg side, it goes off the leading edge through point
Full on middle, clipped through midwicket
Axar with a yorker-length ball outside off, driven out to deep cover

slapped to cover and Nitish Rana hangs on to a hard chance!Axar's good record against Rohit Sharma continues. This is on a length and spinning away. Rohit hit it really well, and really hard, but Rana times his jump well and makes a difficult chance look simple. MI lose their third
On a length around off, blocked by Rutherford
Punches this length ball down to long-off
Pitched up down leg, swept to short fine leg
Sweeps this one from middle stump. Along the ground to deep midwicket. Just 85ks
On a length at leg stump, 82ks, beats the flick and goes off the pad to short fine leg
Tight if that pitched in line. Lbw not given, Axar chats with KL, they won't take it. Back of length just down leg, beat the big one-knee sweep and hit him, also slightly down leg
Keeping it slow. Fullish on middle and leg, SKY leans forward and sweeps hard to deep midwicket
Vipraj is quick and the pace is used by SKY. Gets on one knee, as he often does, points the toe of the bat to the bowler as he lifts it from down to up. The length ball goes over the keeper's head
Goes back and flicks it to deep midwicket
Pitched up outside off, looks to defend to cover. Gets a thick edge to backward point. 90ks
Length just outside off, skids through to beat the block aimed at cover

Very close to the ropes, but Mukesh takes it!He was running to the right from deep square leg, took a high catch, held on as he decelerated and hugged Kuldeep running in from the other side. Vipraj pitched up the topspinner and Rutherford went for the slog sweep. Got a decent chunk too
Length at the stumps, flicked to deep midwicket
Length on leg, punched to long-on
Length just down leg, 82ks, SKY contorts his feet to let it pass
Backs away a touch and punches it off a length, to long-off
Gets opened up a bit by a length ball coming at his left leg, squeezes it out in front
Turns it into a low full toss by getting well forward and sweeps it through short fine leg
This one sits up and is clubbed back with a flat bat. Back of a length, just outside off, hit with the ball right in line with the body
Very wide on a length, Dhir lunges low and looks to cut it square. Goes off the bottom edge to point
Chipped in an unintended but safe area. Dhir thought he chipped the check-drive straight to cover, went well wide and long-off stopped it his left
Slower bouncer dug in very short, slow at 122ks and on the wider side. Dhir jumps and looks to lift a cut. Misses
Yorker on leg, worked to long-on
First ball of the over smoked through the line. SKY dancing down, getting to the pitch and driving it straight
Looks to drive through cover, gets an inside edge that goes through fine leg
Catch it is the call, goes on the bounce to deep midwicket. Googly on a fullish length, SKY was beside the line, so couldn't time the slog sweep properly
Inside-out six. Length ball at the stumps, Dhir gets a decent forward stride, opens the face and drives from high to low. Over extra cover it goes
Slightly down leg, a touch short too. Dhir gets on one knee and sweeps it leg side
Misfield as backward point overrun to the right. Ball spun to the other side. Sweeper cleans up. Low full toss outside off, SKY opened the bat-face and jammed it to guide the ball
Wide and fullish. SKY doesn't move his feet, leans across and flashes the bat, ball goes under
Fifty up, MI captain raises his bat and gets applauded. Gets there with a back of length ball outside off that was driven off the back foot

Umpire takes his time and gives it out. Given out lbw, SKY reviews. He was square-on. Back foot in the crease, front just on it. So, height may not be an issue even though he's hit on the right thigh. Was a back-of-length ball that landed just outside off, SKY went for the pull. Got beaten by the pace and lack of bounce. Impact - off stump, once that came up, SKY walked as he knew it'd be hitting the wickets. 122ks but it didn't look like a slower one on first view.
Fullish just outside off, defended to cover
Fullish length ball on middle, stays leg side of the ball, opens the face and guides it through backward point
Pitched up around off, driven to long-off
Pace on and Santner connects with a chip-drive nicely. Well over the bowler, long-off does well to clean up to the left
Slower one into the pitch, Dhir sees it early and waits in the crease till it reaches just in front of him. Pulls it with full control through square leg
Nattu wrings his hand and delivered a very short ball angling away outside off, pulled through midwicket
No pace on it but Santner has ample time to manufacture it both due to the shortness and width on that. Jumps and cuts it over the infield at point
So many slower balls. This is full and angling in towards off. Santner has to wait after a the backlift and then squeezes it out down the ground
Pitched up again, splits his fingers while releasing, punched down the ground
Low full toss outside off, driven to long-off
Pace-on yorker, KL appeals for lbw but it looked like bat first. Ngidi isn't sure, no review. Yorker at the stumps, Dhir got the bat down and kept it out
Wide and full, slow, would've been wide had he left it, instead he dinks it to cover
Nattu nails his trademark yorker. At the stumps, pace on. Dhir clears his feet while defending to the bowler
Goes for another yorker. Dhir able to get underneath it just a touch, chips a drive it to long-off
Very short, just outside off. Top-edged pull. Santner didn't go through with the shot. Lands safely in the midwicket outfield

Bouncer is pulled straight to deep midwicket. It's been bouncers or yorkers this over, this was a slow one that was straight. Dhir waited on it and pulled from shoulder-height. Didn't lose his shape, just didn't connect well enough
Low full toss on off, driven to long-off

Slower bouncer outside off called wide for line. Santner jumps, reaches out with his hands and flays. Beaten. Looks like DC have reviewed the wide call. Landed down leg and finished right on the line. A teeny bit of the ball is inside, so a point for DC there. Third umpire wants to check the height too, it's 0.27 metres under head-height. Good review as it turns out
Slot ball around the stumps, Santner overhits. Half-decent connection on the drive takes it over cover, long-off cleans up to the right.
123ks bouncer just outside off is pulled into the ground. Rolls to deep midwicket
Similar to the ball that was reviewed. Same response from Santner, beaten again. Wide called again. No review though
Pitched up at the stumps, looks to drive hard and straight. Gets a thick inside edge through midwicket
Slower one doesn't grip and is met with. Short and wide, goes up off the pitch with even pace, Bosch stands tall and cuts it through cover
